title: UI Designer at the job portal Infojobs
description: Redesign of the Infojobs candidate portal user interface, with modular HTML/CSS structures for the entire application lifecycle.
body:
**Infojobs** is one of the leading job portals in Spain, with millions of active users. I participated in the redesign of the **candidate portal** interface, one of the platform's most critical areas.

## User-Centered Redesign

The project was based on an analysis of candidate needs: how they navigate, where they get lost, and which actions they perform most frequently. Based on this foundation, a redesign was proposed that prioritized clarity, accessibility, and speed of use.

## Modular HTML/CSS Structures

Semantic **HTML** and modular **CSS** structures were created to cover the entire application lifecycle: from job searching to profile management, including alerts, applications, and communication with companies.

## Multidisciplinary Collaboration

The work was carried out in close collaboration with product, **PHP** backend, and QA teams, ensuring the implementation aligned with technical and business requirements.

## Technologies

-   UI/UX
-   HTML
-   CSS
-   JavaScript
-   PHP

Client: [infojobs.net](https://www.infojobs.net/)
